description: Configure an interactive drill-through workflow in Oracle Analytics Desktop to allow a manager to click a region bar to see specific orders. Create a workbook with a 'Summary' canvas featuring a Bar Chart of Sales by Region and a 'Details' canvas featuring a Table with Order Date, Customer Name, Product Name, Sales, and Profit. Include a Data Action named 'Drill to Details' that navigates from the Summary canvas to the Details canvas while passing the data context. Save the workbook as 'Drill_Through_Analysis' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Drill_Through_Analysis.dva.
